validation_smoke.name: code.scala L3 validation smoke
signals: sbt compile and sbt test pass with pinned scalaVersion and plugin versions
pattern match on a sealed hierarchy is exhaustive with no compiler warning
effectful code is a value composed in IO/Future and run once at the edge
implicit/given resolution is unambiguous with no ambiguous-implicit error

diagnosis_smoke.name: code.scala diagnosis smoke
signals: non-exhaustive match warning ignored, leading to MatchError at runtime
